# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a VPC with public and private subnets for our three-tier application. Configure basic routing and internet gateway. Keep networking simple for rapid deployment - we'll add VPC flow logs and monitoring later.
# Category: cloud_network_security

Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC'
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: My VPC
  InternetGateway:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::InternetGateway'
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: My Internet Gateway
  AttachGateway:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPCGatewayAttachment'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      InternetGatewayId: !GetAtt [InternetGateway, Id]
  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/24
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1a
  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1b
  PublicSubnet3:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1c
  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1a
  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.4.0/24
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1b
  PrivateSubnet3:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.5.0/24
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1c
Outputs:
  - Description: The ID of the public subnet in availability zone us-east-1a
    Value: !GetAtt [PublicSubnet1, Id]
  - Description: The ID of the public subnet in availability zone us-east-1b
    Value: !GetAtt [PublicSubnet2, Id]
  - Description: The ID of the public subnet in availability zone us-east-1c
    Value: !GetAtt [PublicSubnet3, Id]
  - Description: The ID of the private subnet in availability zone us-east-1a
    Value: !GetAtt [PrivateSubnet1, Id]
  - Description: The ID of the private subnet in availability zone us-east-1b
    Value: !GetAtt [PrivateSubnet2, Id]
  - Description: The ID of the private subnet in availability zone us-east-1c
    Value: !GetAtt [PrivateSubnet3, Id]
